conversation.user: AP Chem exam is May 6. I have Zumdahl textbook and the AP review book. About 600 pages total between both. I'm a sophomore taking it early. Science is my thing but this is my first AP.

expectedAI.diagnosis: confident level + science strength → solid foundation. First AP → format practice (MCQ 60q/90min + FRQ 7q/105min) is critical alongside content
expectedAI.strategy: 3-phase: Phase1(4wks) Zumdahl main + Review parallel → Phase2(2wks) AP Review intensive + FRQ start → Phase3(1wk) mock MCQ+FRQ drill. Total ~2800min needed vs ~4410min available → surplus for FRQ practice
expectedAI.honestAssessment: 600p total over 49 days with 90min/day = fits comfortably. Surplus time for AP format practice (FRQ + MCQ mocks).

alternatives.label: Review book 우선
alternatives.change: Review book 200p first → Zumdahl 약점 챕터만 200p

alternatives.label: FRQ 강화
alternatives.change: Zumdahl 300p 핵심만 + FRQ weekly practice from Week 2

mustIdentify: science confidence → content OK, format is key
diagnosis.mustReflectInPlan: AP exam format practice (MCQ + FRQ) mentioned in strategy
